use_cases: Landing page hero section with prominent call-to-action buttons for SaaS and product launches
Marketing pages requiring primary and secondary action buttons for user conversion
Application entry points with multiple navigation options and CTAs
ai_summary: A hero section component featuring a centered layout with a bold headline, supporting description text, and dual CTA buttons using Radix UI Slot and CVA for variant management. Designed for landing pages and marketing sites, this component provides a professional, conversion-focused entry point with standard button variants including default, outline, and secondary styles. Ships with full accessibility support via Radix UI primitives.
